assignments.name: weekStart
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - 7); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; })() }}

assignments.name: weekEnd
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - 1); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; })() }}

assignments.name: weekLabel
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - 7); const opts = { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }; const end = new Date(); end.setDate(end.getDate() - 1); return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', opts) + ' – ' + end.toLocaleDateString('en-US', opts); })() }}
